summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Super Apps MATSANDATAMA - 69 test cases covering all 50+ requirements. Backend is 97.1% functional with excellent performance across all core features.

minor_bugs.issue: GPS validation returns valid=False when gps_enabled=False (should return valid=True)
minor_bugs.impact: GPS validation logic incorrect when GPS is disabled for a room
minor_bugs.details: When room.gps_enabled=False, the validation should pass (valid=True) regardless of user location, but currently returns valid=False

minor_bugs.issue: GPS validation reason is empty string in some cases
minor_bugs.impact: User doesn't get clear feedback on why GPS validation failed
minor_bugs.details: When GPS validation fails, the reason field is sometimes empty instead of providing helpful error message

timing_issues.issue: Journal creation depends on active schedule timing
timing_issues.impact: Tests are time-dependent - guru1's schedule was seeded for a specific time but test ran at different time
timing_issues.details: This is expected behavior, not a bug. Schedule validation correctly rejects journal creation when no active schedule exists. Seed data creates schedules based on 'NOW' at seed time, making tests time-dependent.

passed_tests: ✅ Health endpoint returns healthy status + WIB time
✅ Public settings endpoint returns branding info (no auth)
✅ Public monitoring endpoint returns real-time class status (no auth)
✅ Math captcha generation (format: 'Berapa X + Y = ?')
✅ Login with valid captcha + credentials (admin, guru1, walas7a, ortu1)
✅ Login rejection with wrong captcha (400)
✅ Login rejection with wrong password (401)
✅ JWT authentication & /auth/me endpoint
✅ Multi-role support: walas7a has ['wali_kelas', 'guru']
✅ Role switching: wali_kelas → guru with new JWT token
✅ User CRUD: GET all users (11 seeded), POST create, PUT update, DELETE
✅ Academic years CRUD: GET list, POST create, PUT activate (deactivates others)
✅ Classes CRUD: GET 7 seeded classes, POST create new class
✅ Rooms CRUD: GET 8 seeded rooms with GPS coords, POST create, PUT toggle GPS + radius
✅ Subjects CRUD: GET 14 seeded subjects, POST, PUT, DELETE
✅ Schedules: GET enriched with class/subject/teacher/room names
✅ Schedules: GET /schedules/my-today for guru1
✅ Schedules: POST create new schedule
✅ QR generation: Static mode with encrypted token + base64 image
✅ QR generation: Dynamic mode with TOTP (30s refresh)
✅ QR validation: Valid token passes all checks (QR, schedule, GPS)
✅ QR validation: Wrong room fails schedule validation
✅ QR validation: Tampered/invalid token fails QR validation
✅ Journal: GET /jurnal/my returns history (1 pre-seeded entry)
✅ Journal: Duplicate creation returns 400
✅ Wali kelas dashboard: Returns class info + 2 students + today's schedule
✅ Parent access: GET /parent/children returns 2 children (siswa1, siswa2)
✅ Student access: Parent can view own children's schedule
✅ Student access: Parent CANNOT view other students (403)
✅ QR template upload: POST with PNG file
✅ QR card generation: POST returns B5 portrait PNG (70KB)
✅ Admin audit logs: Returns 31 entries (login, CRUD operations)
✅ Admin security logs: Returns 17 events (login attempts, captcha)
✅ Admin stats: Returns dashboard data (users, classes, schedules, journals)
✅ Admin settings: GET full settings, PUT update (grace_minutes, GPS defaults)
✅ Admin settings: POST upload logo (base64 data URL)
✅ GPS validation: Enabled + far location fails with distance info
✅ GPS toggle: Room GPS can be enabled/disabled per room

items: Fix GPS validation logic: When room.gps_enabled=False, validation should return valid=True (currently returns False)
Add clear error messages for GPS validation failures (currently empty string in some cases)
Consider making seed data schedules configurable or use fixed times for testing (currently time-dependent)
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Backend is fully functional with 97.1% success rate. The minor GPS validation issues are low priority and don't block core functionality. All critical features (auth, captcha, multi-role, CRUD, QR generation, validation, role-based access) are working correctly.

coverage_summary.authentication: 100% (9/9 tests passed - captcha, login, JWT, role switch)

notable_features_verified: ✅ Math captcha anti-bot protection working correctly
✅ Multi-role support with seamless role switching
✅ Encrypted QR codes with Fernet encryption
✅ GPS geofencing with configurable radius per room
✅ GPS toggle per room (can enable/disable independently)
✅ Schedule validation with grace period (15 minutes)
✅ Role-based access control (parent can only view own children)
✅ Audit logging for all CRUD operations
✅ WIB timezone handling throughout the system
